series_metadata.series_title: Retrospective Rating Plan Annual Loss Statement (Retro Annual Report)
series_metadata.series_description: This record is an annual evaluation statement for the retrospective rating plan. This report is run at the end of each policy year. The retro annual report posts data to let employers and TPA''s (third party administrators) know what the employer is being charged. Since BWC bills employers annually, this statement/report serves as their annual bill for the program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Microform: provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
